title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: California has some of the strongest gun safety laws in the nation.
California has one of the lowest firearm death rates.
Keeping a firearm in your home dramatically increases the likelihood that you or someone you love will be a victim of gun violence.
The presence of a gun in the home increases the risk of homicide for women by 500 percent.
The data shows that having a firearm at home increases the risk of death or serious injury by suicide, homicide, or unintentional injury.
Gun violence is a national public health epidemic.
Gun violence is a physical and psychological trauma that affects the health of patients, families, and communities.
